tspan.tspan: Go to middle or desired text line
or subtitle number.
The “Adjustment” button will modify the
subtitle timeline according to the settings
Counterpart of the “Reparse” button
The “Reparse” button will analyse the subtitle
text and modify the settings accordingly
Counterpart of the “Adjustment” button
The settings can be used to modify,
or conversely be modified by,
the subtitle chronology.
Search and replace with
simple or regex patterns
With or without case sensitivty

text.tspan: Go to start or end of the subtitle text

tspan.tspan: The subtitle text can be modified directly,
via the settings or the find/replace feature.
In these cases, it is highly recommended to
click the "Reparse" button.

text.tspan: Delete the first or last line of the subtitle text

tspan.tspan: File menu (Ctrl-O, Ctrl-S ...)
Path of the file being currently edited.
Turns red if there are pending changes.
May occur directly if theinitial file
format is not UTF-8.
All the time inputs allow to entry data via a
handy time selector when clicking the small
clock on there right. But time may also be
entered manually via the keyboard. And of
course, they allow copy/paste.
